name: relay-browser
description: Multi-screen Electron browser with Screen 1 controller sync, optional ad blocking, concise diagnostics, visible progress, guarded actions, and private routed connections.

scripts.check: node --check src/main-v11.js && node --check src/adblocker.js && node --check src/main.js && node --check src/core.js && node --check src/tor-manager.js && node --check src/tor-bridge.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/page-preload.js && node --check src/renderer/app-v11.js && npm test
